hero.title: The Strong Heart of Your Production Line
hero.desc: Turnkey facility engineering for AISI 304/316L stainless steel industrial tanks, fully automated process systems, and hygienic fluid transfer in compliance with EN and ASME standards.
hero.bgAlt: Welltech Industrial Facility and Stainless Reactor Production

services.title: Turnkey Engineering and Manufacturing Solutions
services.desc: We manufacture CFD-supported, high-engineering equipment in accordance with EHEDG hygienic design guidelines for the food (Dairy, Beverage), chemical, pharmaceutical, and biotechnology industries.

items.title: Industrial Storage Tanks
items.desc: High-capacity, thermally insulated, agitated, and long-lasting AISI 316L stainless steel liquid storage units in accordance with EN 13445 and API 650 standards.

items.title: Automated Process Systems
items.desc: For the critical reactions of your production line; PLC/SCADA controlled jacketed reactors, high-shear homogenizers, and CIP/SIP integrated mixers.

items.title: Hygienic Transfer and Flow Solutions
items.desc: FDA-approved hygienic pump technologies including centrifugal, positive displacement lobe, and air-operated diaphragm pumps for high-viscosity fluid transfer.

why_us.title: In-House Manufacturing Power at Global Standards
why_us.desc: We do not just manufacture independent equipment for your facility; we build complete, sustainable, high-pressure resistant, and energy-efficient process infrastructures with calculated thermodynamics.
list: Manufacturing at ASME, CE (PED 2014/68/EU), ISO, and EHEDG Standards
3D CAD and CFD Analysis Supported Thermodynamic Process Design
NDT (Non-Destructive Testing), Penetrant, and Hydrostatic Pressure Tests
Global Network: 24/7 After-Sales Technical Service and Original Spare Parts

box1.title: GLOBAL AUTOMATION
box1.desc: PLC integrated systems actively operating in over 40 countries

box2.title: HEAVY INDUSTRY DURABILITY
box2.desc: Absolute corrosion and leak-tightness guarantee in all our reactors and tanks
